text_original: All good, just not much time to talk to A.I, it's in app purchase! should have given more time to talk..
text_zh: 一切都好，只是和人工智能对话的时间不多，那是应用内购买！应该给更多对话时间的。
reply_original: Hi! I totally understand. It's frustrating when the conversation is flowing and the limit runs out. Maintaining high-quality AI involves high server costs, so ad revenue alone can't cover unlimited chats for everyone yet. We're working hard to offer more ways to earn free messages! Please share your ideas at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 嗨！我完全理解。当聊得正起劲时次数却用完了，确实很令人沮丧。维持高质量的人工智能需要高昂的服务器成本，因此仅靠广告收入目前还无法为所有人提供无限次的聊天。我们正在努力提供更多赚取免费消息的方式！请通过 support@fantachat.ai 分享您的想法。
